name: Employment Insurance (EI) Regular Benefits
description: Temporary financial assistance for eligible workers who lose their job through no fault of their own.
eligibility: Worked enough insurable hours in the last 52 weeks; lost employment through no fault of your own; ready and willing to work.

name: Ontario Works (OW)
description: Financial and employment assistance for people in financial need who are willing to participate in employment activities.
eligibility: Ontario resident in financial need; willing to participate in employment assistance activities.

name: Ontario Disability Support Program (ODSP)
description: Income and employment supports for people with disabilities who are in financial need.
eligibility: Ontario resident aged 18+ with a substantial physical or mental impairment expected to last one year or more; in financial need.

name: Canada Child Benefit (CCB)
description: Tax-free monthly payment to help eligible families with the cost of raising children under 18.
eligibility: Primary caregiver of a child under 18; resident of Canada for tax purposes; filed taxes.

name: Ontario Baby Bundle
description: Support for new and expecting parents including prenatal vitamins, newborn essentials, and parenting resources.
eligibility: Expecting or new parents in Ontario.

name: Rent-Geared-to-Income Housing
description: Subsidized housing where rent is based on 30% of household income through local social housing providers.
eligibility: Household income below local limits; on or eligible for social housing waitlist in your community.

name: Homelessness Prevention Program
description: Emergency financial assistance to help prevent eviction or secure stable housing in Northern Ontario communities.
eligibility: At risk of homelessness or facing eviction; Ontario resident in financial need.

name: Ontario Health Insurance Plan (OHIP)
description: Covers medically necessary hospital and physician services for Ontario residents.
eligibility: Ontario resident; physically present in Ontario for at least 153 days in any 12-month period.

name: Guaranteed Income Supplement (GIS)
description: Monthly non-taxable benefit for Old Age Security recipients with low income.
eligibility: Receiving OAS pension; low income as defined by Service Canada.

name: Northern Ontario Heritage Fund Corporation (NOHFC)
description: Programs supporting job creation, business growth, and workforce development in Northern Ontario.
eligibility: Businesses and organizations operating in Northern Ontario; varies by program.
